intro.title: 100% financed custom technology to grow without draining cash flow
intro.copy:
Hashinmy is a digital engineering firm that turns business processes into custom intelligent software, automation and applied artificial intelligence. We analyze your operation, detect where time, money or information is lost, build the exact solution and finance 100% of development so your company can modernize without a large upfront investment.
We are not a website agency or a generic software vendor: we are a technology partner that combines business strategy, software engineering, artificial intelligence and accessible financing.
Your company already has knowledge, experience and vision. We build and finance the technology so that knowledge can work better, organize sales, quotes, inventory, support, data, internal processes and digital channels, protecting cash flow while it starts creating real value.
intro.optionQuestion: What is the most comfortable first step for your company?
intro.insight: The first step can now be operational diagnosis, financing or a direct quote, so Hashinmy starts from the real business problem instead of forcing a payment decision before understanding the operation.

options.label: Operational diagnosis
options.hint: I want Hashinmy to find where time, money or information is being lost
options.tech: operation analysis + technical route + financial viability
options.insight: I want to start by understanding my operation, finding the process that slows the business down the most and receiving a clear route before deciding whether to finance, quote directly or build in phases.

options.label: 100% financing
options.hint: I want to modernize without a large upfront payment
options.insight: I want to move forward with development financed 100% and pay through manageable installments while the system starts creating value.

options.label: Direct quote
options.hint: I want to know scope and price without financing
options.insight: I want to receive a direct proposal with clear scope, price and timing so I can decide without a financing plan.

serviceFamily.title: Which process needs to stop improvising?
serviceFamily.optionQuestion: Where does the operation hurt most today?
serviceFamily.copy: Choose the point where your company loses the most time, control or sales. We do not start by selling an isolated service; we start by understanding the operation to define a route that connects business strategy, software engineering, artificial intelligence and a viable way to pay for implementation.
serviceFamily.insight: I choose the need that most affects productivity, commercial flow or operational control so the first technology solution responds to a real business pain.

options.label: Create proprietary software
options.hint: A platform, app or system for your operation
options.insight: I want to build a custom system that turns my company knowledge into a proprietary, scalable and measurable tool.

options.label: Automate with AI
options.hint: Less repetitive work and more operational speed
options.insight: I want to reduce manual work, errors and slow responses with automation, intelligent assistants and integrations connected to the real business.

options.label: Modernize operations
options.hint: Organize Excel, WhatsApp or old systems
options.insight: I want to replace scattered processes with a connected operation, reliable data, clear permissions and traceability.

buildType.title: Where should your software open?
buildType.optionQuestion: Where do you want to use it?
buildType.copy: The technical base must follow the real way the business works. It may be browser, mobile, PC or a staged combination, always with architecture ready to grow without rebuilding the system from zero.

options.label: In a browser
options.insight: I want browser access with server, database and a route ready to scale.

options.label: On mobile
options.hint: For sales, support or field teams (app/PWA)
options.insight: I need a fast phone experience with synchronized data.

options.label: On a PC
options.insight: I need local control, strong performance and stable internal operation.

buildType.insight: The platform should open where your team already works, so technology organizes the operation without forcing the business into an uncomfortable tool.

automationType.title: Which part should the system do for you?
automationType.optionQuestion: What do you want to automate first?
automationType.copy: Artificial intelligence and automation only make sense when they solve concrete friction: repeated tasks, slow service, scattered data, decisions without information or processes that depend too much on human memory.

options.label: Repeated tasks
options.insight: I want process robots, integrations and automatic flows.

options.label: AI assistant
options.insight: I want useful AI with clear rules, traceability and safe limits.

options.label: Visible data
options.insight: I need to see my operation in numbers to decide better.

automationType.insight: The right automation starts with the work that repeats most, gets delayed most or creates the most human error in daily operations.

modernization.title: What do you want to leave behind?
modernization.optionQuestion: What do you want to replace first?
modernization.copy: Modernization is not changing tools for fashion; it is turning spreadsheets, loose messages and old systems into a clearer, safer and measurable operation ready to grow with fewer errors.

options.label: Excel or old system
options.insight: I want to replace spreadsheets and manual processes with modules and permissions.

options.label: Separated tools
options.insight: I want my systems to connect and avoid duplicate typing.

options.label: Unprofessional image
options.insight: I want a platform that communicates trust, clarity and readiness to sell more.

modernization.insight: Leaving spreadsheets, loose messages and old systems behind helps recover traceability, speed and control without changing the essence of the business.

operation.title: How should it be used in real life?
operation.optionQuestion: Where do you need it to work best?
operation.copy: Software must work where work happens: office, field, sales, production, support or management. This answer defines synchronization, permissions, backend, mobile experience or local control according to the real operation.

options.label: From anywhere
options.insight: I want browser, server and data available when I need them.

options.label: Team on the move
options.insight: I need mobile speed, clear permissions and reliable synchronization.

options.label: PC or internal network
options.insight: I need it to work strongly on desktop and synchronize later if needed.

operation.insight: The architecture is decided from real use so the system works in the office, field, sales, production or support without unnecessary friction.

value.title: What should improve first?
value.optionQuestion: What result do you want to notice first?
value.copy: A good platform should feel useful early: organize cases, automate tasks, show actionable data and help sell better. Value is designed so the system starts justifying its investment inside the operation.

options.label: Organize processes
options.insight: First I want to organize how each case moves inside my business.

options.label: Automate work
options.insight: I want to recover time by reducing repetitive tasks and human errors.

options.label: Measure with data or AI
options.insight: I want to turn scattered information into visible decisions.

value.insight: The first visible value must justify the investment: more order, less wasted time, better data, more productivity or more sales opportunities.

risk.title: What should feel most protected?
risk.optionQuestion: What do you want to protect better?
risk.copy: Trust is designed from the first module with roles, permissions, audit trails, validations and limits for artificial intelligence. This helps the company gain speed without losing control over data, decisions and critical processes.

options.label: Users and permissions
options.hint: Each role sees only what it needs (RBAC)
options.insight: I want roles, permissions, change history and access control from the start.

options.label: Sensitive data
options.insight: I need validations, event logs and protection for critical information.

options.label: AI or critical processes
options.insight: I want AI and automation with limits, traceability and human review when needed.

risk.insight: Growth needs control; that is why permissions, audit trails, validations and AI limits are designed before automating critical processes.

finance.title: How do you want to modernize without draining cash flow?
finance.optionQuestion: Which mode makes it viable to move forward now?
finance.copy:
With Hashinmy, the company does not have to choose between protecting cash flow and modernizing. First we make technology transformation possible: we finance 100% of development, define manageable installments according to scope and priority, and let the software start creating value while it is paid in a viable way.
Financing does not replace engineering: it makes it accessible for real companies that need to organize processes, automate work, integrate AI and grow without draining capital.

options.label: Finance 100%
options.hint: Develop with no large initial payment
options.insight: I want to protect operating capital and pay development through manageable installments while the software starts saving time or generating sales.

options.label: Build by phases
options.hint: Start with the module that creates the most value
options.insight: I want to prioritize a useful first version, validate results and expand the system with technical and financial control.

options.label: Talk to an advisor
options.hint: I need technical and financial guidance
options.insight: I want Hashinmy to review my case and propose a viable route according to operation, priority, scope and payment mode.

finance.insight: Financing turns modernization into a viable decision: move now, protect operating capital and pay while technology starts saving time, organizing processes or generating sales.

timeline.title: How soon should it start breathing?
timeline.copy: Pace defines how to turn a large need into useful deliveries. We can start with an MVP, a short phase or an enterprise architecture, making sure every step has operational and financial value.

options.label: As soon as possible
options.insight: I want to find the minimum core that already creates value.

options.label: 1 to 3 months
options.insight: I want to define scope, build, test and launch with control.

options.label: Enterprise stages
options.insight: I want security, scaling, auditing and planned evolution.

timeline.insight: The right pace turns a large need into useful, measurable and financeable deliveries without losing the complete system vision.

summary.title: Your technology route is ready.
summary.copy:
We now have an initial reading of the need, the payment mode and the operational priority. Add any missing context so Hashinmy can analyze your operation, detect where time, money or information is lost, propose a custom solution and define a viable technical, commercial and financial route.
The next conversation should not be only about technology: it should connect the business problem, internal knowledge, system scope, operational priority, expected value and the payment method that protects cash flow while the software starts creating results.
summary.insight: The route is ready for Hashinmy to connect need, business knowledge, technical scope, operational priority, expected value and payment model into a viable proposal.

nextSteps.noService: Commercial diagnosis with initial operational context
